markets.rules_primary: If CD Universidad Catolica del Ecuador is the 2026 Ecuador LigaPro champion, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The Ecuador LigaPro champion is determined through a two-stage competition format. All 16 teams first compete in a full double round-robin regular season, where each team plays every other team twice (home and away).  

After the regular season, the top six teams advance to the First Hexagonal, carrying over the points earned during the regular season. These six teams then play each other twice again.  

The team with the most total points at the conclusion of the First Hexagonal is declared the Ecuador LigaPro champion.
markets.title: Will CD Universidad Catolica del Ecuador win the Ecuador LigaPro?

markets.early_close_condition: If this event occurs, the market will close the following 10am ET.
markets.rules_primary: If the U.S. Department of the Treasury announces that the United States Federal Government failed to make a scheduled payment on a Treasury note, bond, or bill; or that one of the three major credit ratings agencies designate any United States debt in any form of default, before 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will the US default on its debt by Dec 31, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the person announces their candidacy.
markets.rules_primary: If Jake Paul has announced they will run for an elected public office in the 2026 election after Issuance and before Nov 3, 2026, including running for the nomination of any political party to contest that office, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The person must publicly announce their campaign for it to be reported by a Source Agency. Merely filing campaign paperwork with the Federal Election Commission or similar entity is insufficient without a public announcement. The announcement must be for the specific office and election year listed. Exploratory committees or statements of interest without formal campaign announcements do not qualify. Running for a party's nomination to contest the office counts as running for that office. The announcement must come from the person themselves or their official campaign, not from speculation or third-party sources.
markets.title: Will Jake Paul announce a run for an elected public office in 2026?

markets.rules_secondary: If a nomination is withdrawn before the deadline, that market immediately resolves to No.
markets.title: Will Trump’s first officially announced pick for Chairman of the Federal Reserve be confirmed as Chairman of the Federal Reserve before May 15, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if any component becomes impossible to occur (resolving to No) or all components have been satisfied (resolving to Yes).
markets.no_sub_title: JD Vance: Republican, Marco Rubio: Republican
markets.rules_primary: If JD Vance and Marco Rubio both announce presidential campaigns to contest the presidential nomination of the Republican party for the 2028 U.S. presidential election before January 1, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This is a combination market requiring ALL specified outcomes to occur for the contract to pay out. If ANY single component resolves to No or becomes impossible, the entire contract immediately resolves to No. Each component is resolved according to its corresponding Kalshi ruleset: JD Vance (2028RUNPARTY), Marco Rubio (2028RUNPARTY). All conditions must be satisfied before Jan 2028.
markets.title: Will Rubio and Vance run for President?
markets.yes_sub_title: JD Vance: Republican, Marco Rubio: Republican

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the official depth chart is released.
markets.rules_primary: If Tyrod Taylor is officially designated as Kansas City's starting quarterback for Week 1 of the 2026-27 Pro Football season, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Position designation is determined by the official depth chart published by the team for the specified week. If no official depth chart is available, the designation comes from official team communications (injury reports, press releases). For bye weeks, the market uses the last available depth chart before the bye. If the player is injured but still officially listed at the position, the market resolves to Yes. For postseason weeks, if the team is eliminated before that week, the market resolves to No. Practice squad and inactive players do not qualify unless officially promoted to the active roster at the specified position.
markets.title: Will Tyrod Taylor be starting quarterback for Kansas City in Week 1?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If BULLY by Ye / Kanye West's sales, on the Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release of BULLY, are At Least 90000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. If Kanye West / Ye releases an album titled Bully before January 1, 2027, the market will resolve based on the Hits Daily Double chart corresponding to the first full chart tracking week following the album’s wide release.

For example, if Bully is widely released on March 20, the market will resolve using the Hits Daily Double chart dated March 26.
markets.title: Will BULLY have At Least 90000 pure album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release BULLY?

markets.rules_primary: If BULLY by Ye / Kanye West's sales, on the Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release of BULLY, are At Least 30000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. If Kanye West / Ye releases an album titled Bully before January 1, 2027, the market will resolve based on the Hits Daily Double chart corresponding to the first full chart tracking week following the album’s wide release.

For example, if Bully is widely released on March 20, the market will resolve using the Hits Daily Double chart dated March 26.

markets.rules_primary: If the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items less Food and Energy for March 2026, as published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, increases by above 0.7%, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Please note that the value of the Underlying is the single-decimal value reported by the BLS.

In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.
markets.title: Will CPI Core rise more than 0.7% in March?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scores 20+ points in at least 200 consecutive Pro Basketball regular season games before May 15, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
## Consecutive Games Definition

A "consecutive game" requires Shai Gilgeous-Alexander to **appear and record statistics** in that game.

## Streak Rules

- **Counts toward streak:** Regular season games where Shai plays and scores **20+ points**
- **Does not count:** Games where Shai scores fewer than 20 points
- **Does not break streak:** Games where Shai does not play (injury, rest, suspension, or any other reason)
markets.title: How many consecutive regular season games will Shai Gilgeous-Alexander score 20+ points?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire following the first vote to confirm the next Fed Chair nominee or their nomination being withdrawn.
markets.rules_primary: If Mike Lee votes Yea for the next Fed Chair nominee before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market shall resolve to **Yes** if:

- A vote results in the confirmation of the Nominee via a procedure that does not result in the recording of a tally of votes

The market shall resolve to **No** if:

- Such a vote results in the rejection of the Nominee via a procedure that does not result in the recording of a tally of votes
- Should a withdrawal of the nominee's nomination be formally communicated to the United States Senate
- The nominee is withdrawn (or intent to nominate a nominee is withdrawn by the President or President-elect)

Should more than one Senate confirmation vote on the confirmation of the Nominee to the Office be held, the outcome of the first such vote will be used to resolve this market.

The outcomes of committee votes, hearings, or reports, cloture votes and other procedural votes will have no impact on the resolution of this market. Once the vote has been closed and the correct result of the vote has been announced, a request by Mike Lee to add, remove, or alter a vote shall not be considered for purposes of resolving this market, regardless of any change to the official vote tally reported by the website senate.gov or any other official source.
markets.title: Will Mike Lee vote for the next Fed Chair nominee?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the official depth chart is released.
markets.rules_primary: If Geno Smith is officially designated as New York J's starting quarterback for Week 1 of the Pro Football season, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Position designation is determined by the official depth chart published by the team for the specified week. If no official depth chart is available, the designation comes from official team communications (injury reports, press releases). For bye weeks, the market uses the last available depth chart before the bye. If the player is injured but still officially listed at the position, the market resolves to Yes. For postseason weeks, if the team is eliminated before that week, the market resolves to No. Practice squad and inactive players do not qualify unless officially promoted to the active roster at the specified position.
markets.title: Will Geno Smith be starting quarterback for New York J in Week 1?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If any sitting member of the United States Congress has announced that they have changed or will change their political party affiliation after Mar 11, 2026 and before 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This Payout Criterion includes a member switching from partisan affiliation to independent, or independent to a given political party. This Payout Criterion also includes a member of Congress announcing that they will run for the next Congressional office, or in another future political campaign, in a different party's primary. For purposes of this Contract, partisan affiliation encompasses national party affiliations, and does not encompass regional political party affiliation. For example, a member announcing that they intend to join the Democratic Party instead of the Democratic-Farmers-Labor Party will not satisfy the Payout Criterion.
markets.title: Will anyone in Congress change parties?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If any member of Trump's Cabinet leaves their office, or announces they will leave their office, from Mar 11, 2026 to Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The President announcing that a member of the Cabinet will leave the Cabinet also qualifies.

For purposes of this Contract, the Cabinet includes the heads of the 15 government agencies in the Cabinet as of Issuance, as well the Administrator of the EPA, the President’s Chief of Staff, Director of National Intelligence, Director of OMB, Director of CIA, United States Trade Representative, Ambassador to the UN, Chair of the Council of Economic Advisers, Administrator of the SBA, and Director of OSTP. Acting roles are not included. Leaving office as a result of death is not encompassed by the Payout Criterion.
markets.title: Will any member of Trump's Cabinet leave before Jan 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Anthropic PBC has achieved the superior outcome in the trial-level resolution of Anthropic PBC v. U.S. Department of War et al. (originally filed in the U.S. District Court, Northern District of California), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Anthropic PBC achieves the superior outcome through the following exclusive hierarchy:

1. **Net Monetary Recovery (Highest Priority):** Anthropic PBC achieves the superior outcome if they receive a larger net monetary award than all opposing parties combined (after offsetting any awards against Anthropic PBC). Attorney's fees and costs are excluded.

2. **Substantive Legal Victory (Second Priority):** If no net monetary advantage exists, Anthropic PBC achieves the superior outcome if they prevail on claims seeking the largest dollar amount of relief in their original pleadings, or if relief amounts are equal, on the greater number of primary causes of action.

3. **Case Termination Advantage (Third Priority):** If the case terminates without substantive judgment, Anthropic PBC achieves the superior outcome if (as defendant) all claims are dismissed with prejudice, or (as plaintiff) opposing parties voluntarily dismiss all claims with prejudice. All other termination scenarios result in no superior outcome for any party.

**Settlements:** Superior outcome if net payment flows to Anthropic PBC; no superior outcome if payment flows from Anthropic PBC; no party achieves superior outcome if terms are sealed or undisclosed.

**Key exclusions:** Applies only to trial-level resolution — specifically excludes all appeals processes. Procedural victories alone do not constitute superior outcomes.
markets.title: Will Anthropic PBC win Anthropic PBC v. U.S. Department of War et al.?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the central bank announces its decision.
markets.rules_primary: If the Bank of Japan takes the action of Maintain current rate at April 2026 Monetary Policy Meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on the official policy rate decision announced by the central bank. For central banks with multiple policy rates, only changes to the primary policy rate count. If the meeting is cancelled or delayed past the expiration date, markets for "No change" resolve to Yes and all others resolve to No. Emergency rate changes between scheduled meetings do not affect resolution of contracts tied to scheduled meetings. The specific basis point ranges are inclusive (e.g., "25-50bp" includes both 25bp and 50bp changes).
markets.title: Will the Bank of Japan maintain current rate at the April 2026 Monetary Policy Meeting?

markets.rules_primary: If Theo Von is or if it is announced that Theo Von is the the primary target of the roast and whose name appears in the official title or promotional materials of the roast special at the next Netflix-produced live or recorded celebrity roast special released on Netflix, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: To fulfill the Payout Criterion, the specified person must actually appear and carry out the specified role at the event. Being listed in the official lineup without actually performing does not qualify. Joint performances where the person shares the role with another performer do count. The performance qualifies even if delayed, shortened, or modified in format. Pre-recorded content does not qualify unless explicitly designated by organizers as fulfilling the role. markets.rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for All Urban Consumers: All Items less Food and Energy increases by more than 4.0% in the twelve months ending March 2026 (as represented by the one-decimal place value reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.
markets.title: Will the rate of core CPI inflation be above 4.0% for the year ending in March 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if formal charges are filed.
markets.rules_primary: If Raúl Castro has been formally charged with a federal crime  after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Charges filed in military courts are included. The reinstatement of charges filed prior to Issuance does not count; only the filing of a new charging document after Issuance triggers the Payout Criterion.


Formal charges require the filing of a criminal complaint, information, or indictment with an appropriate court. Arrests without charges, being named as a target of investigation, civil lawsuits, and administrative actions do not constitute charges. Traffic violations that don't require court appearances and sealed charges that remain sealed through the deadline also don't count. If charges are filed and then dismissed before the deadline, the market still resolves to Yes. Pre-trial diversion agreements involving formal charges count as charges. For groups of individuals, charges against any member of the specified group trigger the criterion.
markets.title: Will Raúl Castro be charged with a any crime before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if certified election results are published.
markets.rules_primary: If the margin of victory for Ken Paxton in the 2026 Texas Republican Senate runoff falls between 5% and 10%, inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The margin of victory shall be calculated as follows based on the margin type.

- **For percentage points**: the vote percentage received by Ken Paxton minus the vote percentage received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Ken Paxton if Ken Paxton wins, or the candidate/party that finishes first if Ken Paxton loses.
- **For raw votes**: the total votes received by Ken Paxton minus the total votes received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Ken Paxton if Ken Paxton wins, or the candidate/party/option that finishes first if Ken Paxton loses.
- **For electoral votes**: the electoral votes received by Ken Paxton minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the second-most electoral votes if Ken Paxton wins, or the electoral votes received by Ken Paxton minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the most electoral votes if Ken Paxton does not.

Each margin range is inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound. No rounding shall be applied to the calculated margin. For example, for consecutive ranges of 5-6% and 6-7%, a margin of 5.99999% resolves within the 5-6% range, while a margin of exactly 6% resolves within the 6-7% range. If Ken Paxton runs under multiple parties or is listed multiple times, votes attributable to the same underlying natural Ken Paxton will be summed.

If Ken Paxton wins the election, the margin will be positive. If Ken Paxton loses the election, the margin will be negative. If Ken Paxton ties for first place, the margin shall be 0. For uncontested races where Ken Paxton is the only candidate, the margin shall be 100 percentage points or the total number of votes cast (for raw votes).
markets.title: Will the margin of victory for Ken Paxton in the 2026 Texas Republican Senate runoff be between 5% and 10%?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs for any person.
markets.rules_primary: If Tulsi Gabbard is the first member of the Cabinet of Donald Trump to leave or announce they will leave (such as by quitting, being fired, or being impeached) after Mar 10, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
If two persons announce they intend to leave at the same time, then the one who leaves first will resolve to Yes and all others will resolve to No. If multiple persons both announce they intend to leave and leave at the same time as other members, then the one whose last name is alphabetically first will resolve to Yes and all others will resolve to No. A leave of absence does not constitute leaving the position. 

For purposes of this Contract, the Cabinet includes the heads of the 15 government agencies in the Cabinet as of Issuance, as well the Administrator of the EPA, the President’s Chief of Staff, Director of National Intelligence, Director of OMB, Director of CIA, United States Trade Representative, Ambassador to the UN, Chair of the Council of Economic Advisers, Administrator of the SBA, and Director of OSTP. Acting roles are not included. Leaving office as a result of death is not encompassed by the Payout Criterion.
markets.title: Will Tulsi Gabbard be the next person to leave the Trump Cabinet?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the official depth chart is released.
markets.rules_primary: If Zach Wilson is officially designated as Pittsburgh's starting quarterback for Week 1 of the 2026-27 Pro Football season, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Position designation is determined by the official depth chart published by the team for the specified week. If no official depth chart is available, the designation comes from official team communications (injury reports, press releases). For bye weeks, the market uses the last available depth chart before the bye. If the player is injured but still officially listed at the position, the market resolves to Yes. For postseason weeks, if the team is eliminated before that week, the market resolves to No. Practice squad and inactive players do not qualify unless officially promoted to the active roster at the specified position.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if all seats have been called and additional recounts/by-elections will not affect the market outcome.
markets.rules_primary: If TISZA has won above 80 seats in the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
A seat is considered "won" when a candidate affiliated with the specified party has been declared elected by the relevant electoral authority and either:
- The time for legal challenges has expired
- Challenges have been resolved
- The member has taken their seat

Party affiliation is determined by the party under whose banner the candidate was elected, regardless of subsequent changes. The count is determined when the new legislature takes their seats, even if some seats remain vacant or challenged. If the election is postponed beyond one year from the original date or cancelled entirely, the market resolves to the last fair market price. Only seats actually contested and filled are counted in partial elections. By-elections after the main election are included only if seated simultaneously with the rest of the legislature.
markets.title: Will TISZA win above 80 seats in the 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the official depth chart is released.

For postseason weeks, if the team is eliminated before that week, the market resolves to No. Practice squad and inactive players do not qualify unless officially promoted to the active roster at the specified position.
markets.title: Will Tyrod Taylor be Quarterback for Miami in Week 1?

If no official depth chart is available, the designation comes from official team communications (injury reports, press releases). For bye weeks, the market uses the last available depth chart before the bye. If the player is injured but still officially listed at the position, the market resolves to Yes. For postseason weeks, if the team is eliminated before that week, the market resolves to No. Practice squad and inactive players do not qualify unless officially promoted to the active roster at the specified position.
markets.title: Will Malik Willis be starting quarterback for New York J in Week 1?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if a person is formally appointed and invested as Prime Minister.
markets.rules_primary: If Troels Lund Poulsen becomes Prime Minister of Denmark as a result of government formation following the 2026 Danish general election and meets all constitutional requirements before Mar 24, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this contract, **these rules will satisfy the payout criterion:**

- The person must be formally appointed, sworn in, or invested according to the country's constitutional procedures and command the confidence of the parliament/legislature through an investiture vote, formal approval, or constitutional convention.
- They must exercise the full powers of the office, not serve in a caretaker or acting capacity from the previous government.
- The appointment must stem from the government formation process following the specified election.

Serving as caretaker pending government formation, being designated to form a government but not yet invested, leading the party with most seats without forming government, being named as designate without completing constitutional requirements, or holding the position temporarily during coalition negotiations **do NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion**.

Special situations:

- If no government forms by the deadline, all markets resolve to No except "No one" if that option exists.
- If new elections are called before government formation, markets resolve immediately.
- For rotating arrangements, the first person to meet all criteria resolves to Yes.
- If the person leading a party dies before taking office, their market resolves to last fair price and their successor may resolve to Yes.
- Markets for persons not explicitly listed resolve to "Other" if that option exists.
markets.title: Will Troels Lund Poulsen become Prime Minister of Denmark following the 2026 Danish general election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if all seats have been called and additional recounts/by-elections will not affect the market outcome.
markets.rules_primary: If the Freedom Movement has won above 33 seats in the 2026 Slovenian parliamentary election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
A seat is considered "won" when a candidate affiliated with the specified party has been declared elected by the relevant electoral authority and either:
- The time for legal challenges has expired
- Challenges have been resolved
- The member has taken their seat

Party affiliation is determined by the party under whose banner the candidate was elected, regardless of subsequent changes. The count is determined when the new legislature takes their seats, even if some seats remain vacant or challenged. If the election is postponed beyond one year from the original date or cancelled entirely, the market resolves to the last fair market price. Only seats actually contested and filled are counted in partial elections. By-elections after the main election are included only if seated simultaneously with the rest of the legislature.
markets.title: Will the Freedom Movement win above 33 seats in the 2026 Slovenian parliamentary election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if all seats have been called and additional recounts/by-elections will not affect the market outcome.
markets.rules_primary: If Historic Pact has won above 37 seats in the 2026 Colombian Chamber of Representatives election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Resolution Rules

When a Seat is "Won"
A seat is considered "won" when a candidate affiliated with the specified party has been declared elected by the relevant electoral authority, and at least one of the following conditions is met:
The time for legal challenges has expired
Challenges have been resolved
The member has taken their seat

Party Affiliation
Party affiliation is determined by the party under whose banner the candidate was elected, regardless of subsequent changes.

Final Count
The count is determined when the new legislature takes their seats, even if some seats remain vacant or challenged.

Postponed or Cancelled Elections
If the election is postponed beyond one year from the original date or cancelled entirely, the market resolves to the last fair market price.

Partial Elections
Only seats actually contested and filled are counted in partial elections.

By-Elections
By-elections after the main election are included only if seated simultaneously with the rest of the legislature.
markets.title: Will Historic Pact win above 37 seats in the 2026 Colombian Chamber of Representatives election?
